Query.tables: CT A GA GA3 GA4 CPR CPR2 P P2 P4 CP GA5 C

LinkedJoin.Join: C.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND CT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND GA.COURT_CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'OFFICE' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+)= CPR.PARTY_ID AND CPR2.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND P2.PARTY_ID = CPR2.PARTY_ID AND GA3.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND GA3.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA3.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA3.VALID_TO IS NULL AND GA3.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SERVICE' AND GA4.PARTY_ID (+)= A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID AND GA4.VALID_TO IS NULL AND P4.PARTY_ID = A.DEBTORS_EMPLOYERS_PARTY_ID AND ( ( GA5.PARTY_ID IS NOT NULL AND GA5.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID ) OR ( GA5.PARTY_ID IS NULL AND GA5.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND GA5.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA5.CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA5.VALID_TO IS NULL ) )

Query.tables: A GA2 CPR3 CPR2CPR P3 CP2

LinkedJoin.Join: A.AE_NUMBER = ${param.aeNumber} AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = A.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = A.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND ( CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG IS NULL OR CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG = 'N') AND CPR3.CASE_NUMBER = A.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR3.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR3.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CP2.PARTY_ID (+)= CPR3.PARTY_ID AND P3.PARTY_ID = CPR3.PARTY_ID AND GA2.CASE_NUMBER = CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_NUMBER AND GA2.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR3.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA2.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR3.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA2.VALID_TO IS NULL
